entries.title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
entries.description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

entries.title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
entries.description: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

entries.title: ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art
entries.description: The ad comes from Artisan, the AI startup behind billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."

entries.title: In Harvard study, AI offered more accurate emergency room diagnoses than two human doctors
entries.description: A new study examines how large language models perform in a variety of medical contexts, including real emergency room cases — where at least one model seemed to be more accurate than human doctors.

entries.title: AI-generated actors and scripts are now ineligible for Oscars
entries.description: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences said that only performances “credited in the film’s legal billing and demonstrably performed by humans with their consent” will be eligible for Academy

entries.title: The best AI dictation apps, tested and ranked
entries.description: AI-powered dictation apps are useful for replying to emails, taking notes, and even coding through your voice

entries.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
entries.description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

entries.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
entries.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

entries.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
entries.description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

entries.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
entries.description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

entries.title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
entries.description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit.

entries.title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
entries.description: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.

entries.title: 5 days only: Bring a partner or colleague and get 50% off a second TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
entries.description: The BOGO offer is live. For a limited time, buy one pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get 50% off a second of the same ticket type. Offer ends this Friday, May 8. Save here.

entries.title: DoorDash adds AI tools to speed up merchant onboarding, edit photos of dishes
entries.description: DoorDash on Monday added new AI-powered tools that let merchants speed up onboarding, edit photos to make dishes look better, and create new websites from existing content.
